title: Senior Financial Analyst - IDFC First Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - IDFC First Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IDFC First Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IDFC First Bank:
IDFC First Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDFC First Bank!
